title: Broadway Chase
description: Learn to fold marginal broadway vs serious aggression

decisions.description: UTG (tight range) opens 3x. Hero BTN with A♣T♦. Stacks 50 BB eff. Action?

explanation.fold: Защитная игра. ATo vs UTG — marginal, GTO mix fold/call.
explanation.call: Mixed strategy choice. Call in position with ATo vs UTG 3x = defensible.
explanation.3bet: MISTAKE. 3-bet BTN vs UTG = JJ+, AK, AQs. ATo — domination risk.
explanation.default: ATo BTN vs UTG — mixed spot в GTO. Call или fold оба OK.

decisions.description: You called. SB folded. BB folded. UTG 4-bets to 17bb (need to call 14 more, stack 35 behind).

explanation.fold: ✓ ПРАВИЛЬНО. UTG 4-bet range = JJ+, AK only. ATo has ~25% equity. Need 38%+.
explanation.call: ✗ MISTAKE. Это твой #1 leak costing $58/session. UTG 4-bet = value-heavy.
explanation.default: Equity ~25% vs JJ+/AK. Pot odds need 38%. Fold is clear.

scenarios.title: KJo SB vs short-stack limp-raise all-in

decisions.description: UTG (short ~25BB) limped, BTN limped. Hero SB K♣J♥. Complete, fold, or iso-raise?

explanation.raise: ✓ Isolate to 5x. 2 limpers = нужно 5x+ чтобы выбить их.
explanation.fold: Защитная, но SB vs 2 limpers with KJo — iso +EV.
explanation.default: Iso-raise правильно. Sizing critical.

decisions.description: You raised 5x. BB called. UTG limper SHOVES all-in (~25bb total). You need to call 20 more with KJo.

explanation.fold: ✓ FOLD. Limp-raise shove from short = JJ+, AK, AQ. KJo ~25% equity. Need 40%.
explanation.default: Rule #35: Limp-raise all-in from short stack = ALWAYS fold marginal broadway.

decisions.description: UTG limp. Hero CO A♠K♥. Action?

explanation.raise: ✓ Iso-raise 4x standard with AKo vs limp.
explanation.default: Always iso-raise AK vs limp.

decisions.description: Flop J-9-9. BB donks 33% pot (4bb). UTG folds. Hero AK-high no pair.

explanation.fold: ✓ BB donk on paired = value-heavy. A-high marginal bluff-catch multi-way.
explanation.default: Paired board + donk + A-high no pair = fold.

decisions.description: You called flop. Turn Jh = double-paired. BB continues 7bb (22% pot).

explanation.fold: ✓ J-J-9-9 double-paired. BB range: boats, trips, few bluffs.
explanation.default: Never call A-high on double-paired multi-street.

decisions.description: Hero HJ opens AJo. Deep 200 BB. Action?

explanation.default: Open.

decisions.description: CO 3-bets to 11bb. Hero deep 200BB, AJo OOP. Call, 4-bet, or fold?

explanation.fold: ✓ Deep 200BB AJo OOP vs 3-bet = fold-heavy. Save for IP.
explanation.call: Mixed strategy viable. Risky at 200BB OOP.
explanation.default: AJo deep OOP vs 3-bet = tight fold.

decisions.description: CO opens 2.5x. Hero BTN QJo.

explanation.call: QJo IP vs CO open — flat OK.
explanation.default: Call or 3-bet bluff.

decisions.description: CO 4-bets to 22bb. Pot 27, call 19 more. Hero QJo.

explanation.fold: ✓ 4-bet range CO = TT+, AQ+, KQs. QJo dominated. 18% equity.
explanation.call: ✗ Terrible. QJo blockers weak vs 4-bet range.
explanation.default: Always fold QJo to 4-bet.

decisions.description: CO opens 2.2x. Hero BTN KQo, 60 BB.

explanation.3bet: KQo BTN vs CO is primary 3-bet bluff.
explanation.default: 3-bet or call.

decisions.description: You 3-bet to 6bb. CO 4-bets to 14bb. Call 8 more with KQo, 54BB behind?

explanation.fold: ✓ CO 4-bet at 60BB = TT+, AK. KQo dominated.
explanation.default: Your 3-bet bluffs fold to 4-bets. That's the plan.

decisions.description: Hero BTN opened 2.5x with KTs. SB 3-bets to 11bb. Call, fold, or 4-bet?

explanation.call: ✓ KTs suited broadway with blockers, IP deep, implied odds OK.
explanation.fold: Over-tight. KTs one of best calling hands BTN IP.
explanation.default: Call with position. Don't fold profitable continues.

scenarios.title: ATs SB vs CO open multi-way

decisions.description: CO opens 2.5x. Hero SB ATs. BB behind. 3-bet, call, or fold?

explanation.3bet: Good 3-bet value — squeezes BB, isolates CO.
explanation.call: Mixed strategy OK. SB OOP reduces realization.
explanation.default: 3-bet or call, NEVER fold ATs SB vs CO.

decisions.description: UTG limp. Hero CO AQo.

explanation.default: Raise 4-5x.

decisions.description: You iso 4.5x. Folds. UTG limper RAISES all-in for 75bb total. Call 70 more. AQo?

explanation.call: ✓ AQo slight favorite vs limp-shove range (many AJ, KQ, weaker).
explanation.default: Unlike KJ/AT, AQo beats limp-shove range on average.

decisions.description: 3BP OOP. You 3-bet SB, BTN called. Flop 7-4-2, you cbet 33%, called. Turn 9. You check. BTN bets 2/3 pot (16bb). AK no pair.

explanation.fold: ✓ BTN called flop + bet turn on overcard = value-heavy.
explanation.call: Still have 2 overs + backdoor. Close but fold default.
explanation.default: A-high OOP on bricked turn = fold to aggression.

decisions.description: UTG opens 2.5x (60BB stack). Hero HJ ATo.

explanation.fold: ✓ ATo HJ vs UTG open = mostly fold. Position disadvantage + domination risk.
explanation.call: Mixed OK if UTG opens wide.
explanation.default: Defense vs UTG needs strong broadway, ATo marginal.

decisions.description: 3BP BB vs BTN. Flop A-7-3, you cbet 33%, called. Turn 2, check-check. River Q. You check. BTN OVERBETS 45bb into 35. You have KJ-high.

explanation.fold: ✓ KJ high. Overbet on river after check-check means monster.
explanation.default: River overbet + KJ high = autofold.
